description_long: This is a small, single-serving plastic bottle of juice with a rounded body and a short neck, topped by a green screw cap. The front label displays the brand 'Simply Grapefruit' along with an illustration of a grapefruit, suggesting the juice flavor. The bottle is mostly a translucent peach-pink color, allowing the juice inside to be partially visible. The back of the bottle features a nutritional information panel, while the sides are plain and unadorned. The overall shape is ergonomic, designed for easy gripping and portability, typical for beverages intended for on-the-go consumption.
description: A small plastic bottle of Simply Grapefruit juice with a green cap, peach-pink body, and a front label featuring a grapefruit illustration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Simply Grapefruit' label and a grapefruit illustration.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible label or graphics, showing the plain peach-pink bottle surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutritional information panel and barcode.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain with no visible label or graphics.
